zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella la Zouche於1318年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯時，她的父親Eudes la Zouche21歲，母親Joan Inge20歲。她於大約1335年與James Lovell在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年7月2日在英國多瑟特比阿明斯特享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella la Zouche于1318年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯时，她的父亲Eudes la Zouche21岁，母亲Joan Inge20岁。她于大约1335年与James Lovell在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年7月2日在英国多瑟特比阿明斯特享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Chantal, Dominique, Francois, Herve, Michel, Rodolphe, Serge.
French (Fouché): variant of Foucher . Compare Fooshee , Foshee , Fouch , and Foushee .
Altered form (Fouché) of French Foucher (compare 1 above), found mainly in South Africa.

variants.name: Foucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Etienne, Henri, Lydie, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Folchari, composed of the elements folk, folc ‘people’ and hari ‘army’. Compare Faucher 2.

variants.name: Foushee
meanings: Americanized form of French Fouché (see Fouche 1).

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its original form Fouché) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Fooshee
meanings: Americanized form of French Fouché (see Fouche 1).

variants.name: Foshee
meanings: Americanized form of French Fouché (see Fouche 1).

variants.name: Fouch
meanings: Altered form of French Fouché (see Fouche 1).
Altered form of   Fouts  , a surname of German origin.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Fudge  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella la Zouche was born in 1318, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Eudes la Zouche, was 21 and her mother, Joan Inge, was 20. She married James Lovell about 1335, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 2 July 1387, in Beaminster, Dorset, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella la Zouche est née en 1318, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Eudes la Zouche, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan Inge, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé James Lovell environ 1335, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 juillet 1387, à Beaminster, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella la Zouche 1318 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eudes la Zouche 21 und ihre Mutter Joan Inge 20. Sie hat um 1335 in England, United Kingdom James Lovell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Juli 1387 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Beaminster, Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella la Zouche è nata il nel 1318 nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Eudes la Zouche, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Joan Inge, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato James Lovell circa 1335, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 luglio 1387, nel Beaminster, Dorset, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella la Zoucheが1318年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで生まれた時，父Eudes la Zoucheは21歳，母Joan Ingeは20歳であった。約1335年にイギリスイギリスでJames Lovellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年7月2日にイギリスドールセトビーミンスターで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella la Zouche(이)가 1318년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eudes la Zouche(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Inge(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드에서 James Lovell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 7월 2일 영국 도르세트 브이민스터에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella la Zouche nasceu em 1318, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Eudes la Zouche, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan Inge, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com James Lovell aproximadamente 1335, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de julho de 1387, em Beaminster, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella la Zouche родилась в 1318 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Eudes la Zouche было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Inge, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Lovell около 1335 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 июля 1387 г. в местности биминстир, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella la Zouche nació en 1318, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Eudes la Zouche, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joan Inge, tenía 20 años. Se casó con James Lovell aproximadamente 1335, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de julio de 1387, en Beaminster, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
